report.summary: UX audited 4 new learn pages (EIP-7702, Passkey Wallets, Lido V3, Institutional Adoption), created 2 branded OG images for pages missing them, updated OG meta references, and added global accessibility improvements (focus styles, reduced motion, fadeIn animation, responsive typography).

sections.title: UX Audit Findings
items: Audited 4 pages built today: EIP-7702 Smart Accounts, Passkey Embedded Wallets, Lido V3 stVaults, Institutional Crypto Adoption
Overall score: 8/10 — strong glass card consistency, proper heading hierarchy, good responsive grids, all have Breadcrumb + BackToTop
Issue found: EIP-7702 and Passkey pages missing visible keyboard focus styles on tab buttons
Issue found: No @keyframes fadeIn defined globally (referenced by tab panels on both pages)
Issue found: No prefers-reduced-motion support for users with motion sensitivity
Issue found: Tab navigation not wrapping on narrow mobile screens (missing flex-wrap)
Issue found: H1 font size on EIP-7702 and Passkey pages used fixed 2.4rem instead of responsive clamp()
Issue found: Tab containers missing aria-label for screen reader context
No form validation issues (no forms on these pages)
Lido V3 and Institutional pages scored higher — already using clamp() and StructuredData component

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: eip-7702-smart-accounts-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — smart account architecture diagram with EOA/gasless/batch/paymaster nodes, Pectra stats, brand-consistent glass cards
OG image: passkey-embedded-wallets-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — fingerprint visual with 6 provider nodes (Coinbase/Privy/Dynamic/Web3Auth/Turnkey/Para), market stats, biometric theme

sections.title: UX Improvements Implemented
items: Added @keyframes fadeIn to globals.css for tab panel transitions
Added prefers-reduced-motion media query to globals.css disabling animations for motion-sensitive users
Added global focus-visible styles (2px solid #6366f1 outline) for buttons, links, and tab roles
Updated EIP-7702 page: responsive h1 with clamp(1.75rem, 4vw, 2.4rem), aria-label on tablist, flex-wrap for mobile tabs
Updated Passkey page: responsive h1 with clamp(1.75rem, 4vw, 2.4rem), aria-label on tablist, flex-wrap for mobile tabs
Updated EIP-7702 layout.tsx: OG image refs now point to static SVG instead of dynamic /api/og endpoint
Updated Passkey layout.tsx: OG image refs now point to static SVG instead of dynamic /api/og endpoint
Updated JSON-LD structured data image reference in EIP-7702 layout to use static SVG

sections.title: Files Modified
items: src/app/globals.css — added fadeIn keyframes, prefers-reduced-motion, focus-visible styles
src/app/learn/eip-7702-smart-accounts-guide-2026/layout.tsx — OG image URLs updated to static SVGs
src/app/learn/eip-7702-smart-accounts-guide-2026/page.tsx — clamp() h1, aria-label, flex-wrap tabs
src/app/learn/passkey-embedded-wallets-guide-2026/layout.tsx — OG image URLs updated to static SVGs
src/app/learn/passkey-embedded-wallets-guide-2026/page.tsx — clamp() h1, aria-label, flex-wrap tabs
public/og-eip-7702-smart-accounts-guide-2026.svg — NEW branded OG image
public/og-passkey-embedded-wallets-guide-2026.svg — NEW branded OG image
